# Semantic Conventions for GenAI Rerank

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

<!-- toc -->

- [Rerank Span](#rerank-span)

<!-- tocstop -->

## Rerank Span

GenAI rerank represents a request to a Generative AI service that reorders documents based on their relevance to a query. This is commonly used in RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines to improve retrieval quality.

<!-- semconv span.gen_ai.rerank.client -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- /semconv -->

### Span name

**Span name** SHOULD be `rerank {gen_ai.request.model}` if model is available, otherwise `rerank`.

### Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Description | Requirement Level |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gen_ai.provider.name` | string | The Generative AI provider name | Required |
| `gen_ai.operation.name` | string | The name of the operation (`rerank`) | Required |
| `gen_ai.request.model` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to | Conditionally Required: if available |
| `server.address` | string | GenAI server address | Recommended |
| `server.port` | int | GenAI server port | Conditionally Required: if `server.address` is set |
| `gen_ai.rerank.query` | string | The query used for reranking | Opt-in |
| `gen_ai.rerank.top_k` | double | Number of top documents to return | Recommended |
| `gen_ai.rerank.input_documents` | string[] | Input documents for reranking | Opt-in |
| `gen_ai.rerank.output_documents` | string[] | Output documents after reranking | Opt-in |
| `error.type` | string | Error type if the operation ended in an error | Conditionally Required: if error |

> [!Warning]
> `gen_ai.rerank.query` and document attributes may contain sensitive information.

[DocumentStatus]: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/v1.37.0/specification/document-status.md
